calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROBERT FOSTER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 473(b).
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. THE MOTION WAS NOT BROUGHT WITHIN A REASONABLE PERIOD OF TIME AS REQUIRED BY CCP SECTION 473(b). (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Carlito Mandia, CSR 689

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Continued To Dec-01-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. DEFENDANT ROBERT FOSTER'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to December 1, 2008 per agreement of the parties. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225.
Plaintiff Jeff Breibard, dba Law Office of Jeff Breibart, was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Robert D. Foster, dba Bob Foster Consulting and Engineering, Inc., Trustee for P.C. Foster Trust, and Robert D. Foster.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Family Court Settlement Officer Order filed 08/24/06--------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jeff Breibart, dba Law Office of Jeff Breibart, and against defendants Robert D. Foster, dba Bob Foster Consulting and Engineering, Inc., Trustee for P.C. Foster Trust, and Robert D. Foster as follows:

Damages - $45,000.00.
Interest - $4,500.00, for a total judgment of $49,500.00.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment shall be prepared by plaintiff and submitted to the Court for review no later than Wednesday, March 12, 2008.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Continued To Feb-27-08 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 502
